title: release 1.7.0: bump, self-onboard, verify, tag, push
action: Standard release flow (memory + release-tuple suite): node scripts/bump_version.mjs 1.7.0; self-onboard beegog (onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply); run the FULL configured verify FOREGROUND and require green; commit all release artifacts with tag v1.7.0; push with tags. No host propagation (removed 2026-07-17; user updates other projects).
